description: This prompt generates an ultra-detailed fantasy beauty portrait of a rabbit-eared woman in embroidered hanfu, ideal for elegant character art, costume design, or cinematic AI portrait showcases.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成精致的兔耳女性 Hanfu 刺绣肖像，适用于角色艺术、服装设计或影视级 AI 肖像展示。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 生成精緻的兔耳女性 Hanfu 刺繡肖像，適用於角色藝術、服裝設計或電影級 AI 肖像展示。
description_i18n.ja: 刺繍入り Hanfu を着たウサギ耳の女性の超精細ファンタジー美人画を生成。キャラクターアート、衣装デザイン、映画的な AI ポートレート制作に最適。
description_i18n.ko: 자수가 놓인 Hanfu를 입은 토끼 귀 여성의 초정밀 판타지 미인도를 생성합니다. 캐릭터 아트, 의상 디자인, 영화적 AI 초상화 제작에 이상적입니다.
description_i18n.de: Erstellt ultra-detaillierte Fantasy-Porträts einer Hasenohren-Frau in besticktem Hanfu, ideal für Charakterkunst, Kostümdesign oder filmische KI-Porträt-Showcases.
description_i18n.fr: Génère un portrait fantasy ultra-détaillé d'une femme aux oreilles de lapin en hanfu brodé, idéal pour l'art de personnages, le design de costumes ou les portraits IA cinématographiques.
description_i18n.ru: Создаёт детализированный фэнтезийный портрет девушки с кроличьими ушами в вышитом hanfu для арта персонажей, дизайна костюмов или кинематографичных AI-портретов.
description_i18n.es: Genera un retrato de fantasía ultra detallado de una mujer con orejas de conejo en hanfu bordado, ideal para arte de personajes, diseño de vestuario o retratos cinematográficos con IA.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Gera um retrato de fantasia ultra detalhado de uma mulher com orelhas de coelho em hanfu bordado, ideal para arte de personagens, design de figurino ou retratos cinematográficos com IA.
description_i18n.it: Genera un ritratto fantasy ultra dettagliato di una donna con orecchie da coniglio in hanfu ricamato, ideale per character art, costume design o ritratti AI cinematografici.
description_i18n.vi: Tạo chân dung kỳ ảo siêu chi tiết của người phụ nữ tai thỏ trong hanfu thêu, lý tưởng cho nghệ thuật nhân vật, thiết kế trang phục hoặc chân dung AI điện ảnh.
description_i18n.pl: Generuje ultra-szczegółowy fantasy portret kobiety z uszami królika w haftowanym hanfu, idealny do art postaci, projektowania kostiumów lub kinowych portretów AI.
description_i18n.id: Menghasilkan potret fantasi ultra-detail wanita bertelinga kelinci dalam hanfu bordir, ideal untuk seni karakter, desain kostum, atau tampilan potret AI sinematik.
description_i18n.nl: Genereert een ultra-gedetailleerd fantasy schoonheidsportret van een vrouw met konijnenoren in geborduurd hanfu, ideaal voor karakterkunst, kostuumontwerp of cinematische AI-portretshowcases.
description_i18n.ar: ينشئ صورة شخصية خيالية فائقة التفاصيل لامرأة بأذني أرنب ترتدي hanfu مطرزًا، مثالي لفن الشخصيات وتصميم الأزياء أو عروض الصور السينمائية بالذكاء الاصطناعي.
description_i18n.tr: İşlemeli hanfu giymiş tavşan kulaklı bir kadının ultra-detaylı fantezi güzellik portresini oluşturur, karakter sanatı, kostüm tasarımı veya sinematik AI portre vitrinleri için ideal.
description_i18n.uk: Генерує ультрадеталізований фентезійний портрет жінки з кролячими вухами у вишитому hanfu, ідеально для арту персонажів, дизайну костюмів або кінематографічних AI-портретів.
description_i18n.en: This prompt generates an ultra-detailed fantasy beauty portrait of a rabbit-eared woman in embroidered hanfu, ideal for elegant character art, costume design, or cinematic AI portrait showcases.

query.en: A highly detailed fantasy portrait of a young woman in side profile wearing elegant white rabbit ears and traditional East Asian hanfu in a snowy winter garden. She has {argument name="hair color" default="silver white"} hair, extremely long, silky, and softly wind-swept, styled with ornate floral and jeweled hair ornaments. The face is mostly obscured by a large centered rectangular blur mask in muted gray, covering the eyes, nose, and upper cheeks, as if censored for privacy. The rabbit ears are tall, plush, white, and realistic, with pale pink inner fur, attached through an elaborate headdress featuring black lace, silver filigree, small blossoms, crystals, beads, and tassels. Visible in the headdress are 2 round embroidered ornaments with black rabbit motifs, plus multiple dangling tassels in black and white, delicate chains, and floral metal branches. She wears asymmetrical long earrings with beads and tassels. Her robe is a layered {argument name="outfit style" default="black-and-white hanfu with rabbit embroidery"}, with glossy dark trim, translucent pale fabric, and embroidered rabbit designs visible in 3 places: one small rabbit near the collar, one large circular rabbit emblem on the chest, and one faint rabbit motif on the sleeve. The overall palette is monochrome silver, white, charcoal, and soft gray, creating a cold ethereal mood. Snow is gently falling in the foreground and background. Behind her is a softly blurred {argument name="background setting" default="snow-covered classical Chinese garden with pavilion roofs"}, with shallow depth of field, atmospheric haze, cinematic bokeh, ultra-fine textile detail, soft winter lighting, elegant composition, and a serene mystical aesthetic. Vertical portrait framing, upper torso crop, luxurious fantasy costume photography, ultra-realistic, high detail, polished editorial beauty image.
